name: Frontier Usefulness External Review
about: Track an outside replay and usefulness audit for the Frontier Usefulness portfolio.
title: "Frontier usefulness external review: <reviewer>/<run-id>"
labels: ["evidence-docket", "external-replay", "usefulness", "L4"]
---

## Objective

Complete real external reviewer replay for the Frontier Usefulness portfolio.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Reviewer used a clean fork or clean checkout
- [ ] Reviewer ran `AGI ALPHA Frontier External Review / L4+`
- [ ] Replay artifact downloaded
- [ ] Hash manifests reviewed
- [ ] Local baseline results reviewed
- [ ] Cost ledger reviewed
- [ ] Safety ledger reviewed
- [ ] External benchmark adapters reviewed
- [ ] Attestation completed
- [ ] No empirical SOTA claim accepted without external benchmarks

## Claim boundary

This issue does not attempt to prove AGI, ASI, empirical SOTA, safe autonomy, or broad scalability. It tests whether the Frontier Usefulness Evidence Dockets can be replayed and reviewed externally.
